title: quercus durata var. gabrielensis
intro: Quercus durata var. gabrielensis, also known as Gabriel oak, is a variant of the Quercus durata tree, which is native to California. It is a plant used in traditional herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Gabriel oak include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health due to its high content of polyphenols and flavonoids. Herbal preparations of Gabriel oak include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
